content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:5 SecureField) with a subscription paywall (App/PaywallView.swift), and demo credentials exist (review_information/demo_user.txt/demo_password.txt), but notes.txt contains only "n/a" — no steps explaining how to reach the paywalled core features (blocking, schedules, reports).
Pierre: Apple's reviewers reject or delay apps under 2.1 when they can't reach core functionality; a login plus a paywall means they need explicit guidance, not just credentials. The demo account looks real, but "n/a" in notes.txt gives no path to test subscription-gated blocking features. Replace notes.txt with actionable steps: how to sign in, whether the demo account has premium unlocked, and how to trigger the blocking/schedule flows.
